observations.summary: The phrase 'already begun the work of comfortable reinterpretation' echoes Dan's ongoing psychological process of rationalizing his experiences and internal conflicts, reflecting a motif of self-deception and gradual acceptance of altered truths.

source_evidence.quote: But he'd already begun the work of comfortable reinterpretation.

observations.target_hint: This motif parallels Dan's internal struggle with his father's influence and his own journey of self-integration, as seen throughout the narrative chapters describing his psychological and spiritual battles.
